dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9585 IH: Advancing American Quantum Leadership Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Lawler (for himself and Mr. Gottheimer) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To amend the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 to include quantum information science and technology in the areas covered by the Program on China and Transformational Exports.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Advancing American Quantum Leadership Act of 2026.

section.header: Modification to Program on China and Transformational Exports
section.text: Section 2(l)(1)(B)(v) of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 (12 U.S.C. 635(l)(1)(B)(v)) is amended by striking Quantum computing. and inserting Quantum information science and technology..
